_comment: The lab-biosafety-assessment (HC-05) eval set. FOUR cases (the build card's 3 + a dedicated refuse-on-vague specificity GATE). Case 1 is the CORE LEVER — engineering-containment-first + the risk-group -> BSL determination + [GAP]-not-invent: a BSL assigned from the agent alone (ignoring aerosolization), or a 'wear a respirator and gloves' treatment with no biosafety cabinet / BSL facility, must be FLAGGED and pushed up the hierarchy (engineering containment -> procedures -> PPE last); and an UNKNOWN / unlisted agent risk group must produce a literal [GAP] routed to a competent biosafety officer, NEVER an invented risk group or BSL (an invented BSL is an indefensible containment decision). Case 1 carries the CANDIDATE golden output evals/output/lab-biosafety-assessment.md. Case 2 is regulatory_citation_accuracy[hard-fail] + classification accuracy — mis-classifying the agent's risk group, mismatching the BSL practices/facility/equipment to the risk group + procedure, or mis-stating the risk-group -> BSL principle, or mis-citing CDC/NIH BMBL 6th ed / WHO LBM 4th ed, must fail. Case 3 is the de-id PAIR (PHI + OH data, highest tier): the eval CASE wires the CLEAN positive (evals/files/biosafety-clean.md) so the per-skill gate passes without a spurious hard-fail; the SEEDED-LEAK NEGATIVE (evals/files/biosafety-leak.md) is proven CAUGHT by the deterministic de-id grader (auto_fail True on a named worker + the specimen-source patient's identity & clinical result + the worker's serological-surveillance / OH record + phone + re-id key + a <5 lab-incident cell), AND the <5 small-cell suppression is asserted EXPLICITLY (conditions['no_small_cell'] is False — the D-03 HARD-fail), while the paired clean version does NOT trip. Case 4 is the specificity GATE: refuse to assess 'a lab' / a PPE-led 'just wear a respirator' until the named lab + the specific agent + the agent's risk group (or a [GAP]) are captured. The risk-group -> BSL determination is a structured method over the named agent + procedure + the cited BMBL/WHO LBM classification — never a calculation (no new engine); the hierarchy gate is a deterministic controls.py call (rank_controls / validate_treatment). rubric.yaml is the canonical template/evals/rubric.yaml. Model-graded weighted >=4.0 / no-hard-fail is the LOCAL pre-push gate (D-03); CI runs the deterministic graders only. The golden output is a CANDIDATE — owner LOCKS in P17.
_p17_gap: D-11/QUAL-02: original eval cases were LOST — file was committed truncated/invalid since Phase 15 (commit e85b259, only version in git; zero complete cases). This policy-sensitive skill ships on the DETERMINISTIC FLOOR ONLY and is model-grader-exempt (D-11). Real >=3 eval cases are an OWNER-OWNED backfill, accepted as a documented [GAP] at v1.2.0 (owner decision 2026-06-24). See 17-01-SUMMARY.md.
